name: sopaan
description: Sopaan — AI-powered government exam prep for Indian students

scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @sopaan/server && npm run lint -w @sopaan/mobile
scripts.test: npm run test -w @sopaan/server && npm run test -w @sopaan/mobile
scripts.validate: npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run i18n:check -w @sopaan/mobile
